rationale: The cited paper is in a related but different context (permission-based email customization with an MDP-probit and layout optimization), while the citing paper studies sponsored-search position effects on CTR, conversion, and profit via a randomized bid field experiment and hierarchical Bayesian system. There is plausible overlap on click-through/position modeling, but the evidence provided is only a DOI-level reference match with no in-text citation context, so it is not safe to classify as obvious mention-only or clearly substantive.
